tier: Tier 5.21 - NEST Per-Neuron State Dimensionality Diagnostic Contract
claim: Tier 5.21 locks the NEST per-neuron state dimensionality diagnostic protocol. Question: does per-neuron spike PR exceed 4.0 at 16 polyps (512 channels) and exceed 2x per-polyp aggregate PR? Primary sham: shuffled neuron-to-polyp assignment. 4 outcome classes. Contract only; no scoring.
caveat: Contract only; not scoring, not mechanism promotion, not a baseline freeze, not public usefulness proof, not hardware/native transfer.
